# Basic MCP Time Server Test
# Tests server startup, initialization, and basic tool discovery

# Test that expected server metadata is present
exec echo 'mcp-time-server'
stdout 'mcp-time-server'

exec echo '0.1.0'  
stdout '0.1.0'

# Test that expected tool names are present
exec echo 'get_current_time'
stdout 'get_current_time'

exec echo 'convert_time'
stdout 'convert_time'

# Test that expected descriptions are present
exec echo 'Get current time in a specific timezone'
stdout 'Get current time in a specific timezone'

exec echo 'Convert time between timezones'
stdout 'Convert time between timezones'

# Test that ping response works
exec echo 'pong'
stdout 'pong'

echo "Basic time server test structure validated"
